properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v3 v1 v4 v1 v1 v1 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I will choose Christ I will choose love I choose to serve I give my heart I give my life I give my all to You.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Some days are hard And I fight to see the truth But I'm gonna take a stand In all I say and do.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Some fall away And some refuse to see A willing and humble heart I pray You'll find in me.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You are grace, You are peace You are hope and healing You are faith, You are joy You are God revealing Jesus, my Lord and King

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I give my all to You.
